name: EGB OE TL.Z./BMW
summary: Bayerische Motoren Werke AG (BMW) is a German multinational corporation headquartered in Munich that produces automobiles and motorcycles. BMW's products are marketed under the brands BMW, Mini and Rolls-Royce, and the company also produces motorcycles under the BMW Motorrad brand. BMW provides financial services such as premium financing, leasing, fleet management and mobility services.
